socketedItems.secDescrText: Targets an allied player to apply a buff which links you to them for a duration. While linked, your Energy Shield will intercept some of the damage they would take. Linked target takes 14% less Damage
30% of Damage from Hits against target is taken from your Energy Shield before them

Link breaks if target leaves range or line of sight for 4 seconds
Maximum 1 Link from any source per target
You die if Linked target dies
